globalHeaders.content-security-policy: default-src 'self' https:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://app.powerbi.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://api.powerbi.com https://app.powerbi.com; frame-src 'self' https://app.powerbi.com; frame-ancestors 'self'
